title: Srinagar, Jammu and Kashmir — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Srinagar, Jammu and Kashmir: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Srinagar is a city in Jammu and Kashmir with a population of 1,250,000. The summer capital of Jammu and Kashmir, famous for its Dal Lake, houseboats, Mughal gardens, and stunning Himalayan scenery.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
